allowed_scope: Scoped fit or status row has current local evidence for the named type dimension endpoint estimator inference and route.
evidence_rule: Must cite local tests dashboard rows or design notes for the exact cell.
next_gate: Keep covered scoped to the row contract.

allowed_scope: Some endpoint route or diagnostic evidence exists but at least one named endpoint inference route or structured type is missing.
evidence_rule: Must name both present and missing pieces.
next_gate: Resolve each missing piece before changing status.

allowed_scope: Design intent exists without enough implementation evidence.
evidence_rule: Must point to the owning slice ledger or design note.
next_gate: Promote only after validator-owned evidence exists.

allowed_scope: Slice work has code docs dashboard evidence and validation for that slice contract.
evidence_rule: Must cite an existing evidence file and pass mission-control validation.
next_gate: Keep evidence current when rows move.

allowed_scope: Work cannot move because a concrete gate is missing or failed.
not_claimed: Permanent unsupported status unless the row says unsupported.
evidence_rule: Must name blocker and next unblock action.

allowed_scope: Route exists as diagnostic or draft evidence but is not public R bridge support.
not_claimed: Supported bridge or public optimizer controls.
evidence_rule: Must cite route-specific direct evidence and next promotion gate.

allowed_scope: The row is intentionally rejected or not implemented in the current route.
evidence_rule: Must cite rejection tests or a design boundary.
